blended.narrative: Big Sky is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.4 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 6,907 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.0" of new snow over the past week. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 56".
